# Simple Linear Regression {simple-linear-regression}

```{r simple-linear-regression-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/simple-linear-regression-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/simple-linear-regression/"
)
```

```{r child-simple-linear-regression, child="../lecture-content/03-simple-linear-regression.Rmd"}
```
